Adventure #6—The Write Stuff
Adventure #7—Oh, What a Tangled “Today I would like to pass along a gift that has been extremely valuable to me,” she began. “It’s a gift that has	Web We Weave Previous Lesson Next Module	Mark as Complete
made it possible for me to attend this wonderful college, when I didn’t think I would be able to. This gift is theAdventure #8—To Sleep, Perchance
to Come Up with Great Ideas secret behind my academic success at this fine institution, and subsequent nomination as your valedictorian—
an honor I take seriously.	Adventure #9—The Beginning
Postscript... Four Years Later	MODULES
“And this same gift even helped my dad to find love after his heartbreak of losing my mom.”
Donna, sitting beside me, glanced over at me and squeezed my hand as we both remembered that day in the
café.
“As you begin this exciting new chapter in your personal and professional lives, I know you will find this gift a very
precious tool—one that could very well change your life for the better, just as it did the lives of me and my family.
“You’ve probably heard about how you should ‘think outside the box.’ But now, I’d like to show you how to think
inside the box…”
How to Use the 15 Idea-Generating,
Problem-Solving Boxes
Following are all 15 idea-generating, problem-solving boxes. Feel free to copy them and use them to:
• Solve problems at home or work.
• Generate more and better ideas for any project or undertaking.
• Improve your relationships with loved ones.
• Come up with ways to make (or save) more money.
• Help support a worthy organization.
• Discover how to get what you want out of life.
Please resist the urge to skip one or more of the 15 boxes, even if, at first glance, a box seems inappropriate to
your situation or problem. You’ll often find that the boxes that seem least likely to apply to your situation will
often yield the best results—provided you make the effort to make the connections.
And last but not least, if you make using these boxes a conscious habit, after a while, the creativity they trigger
will become second nature to you. Your brain will effortlessly start coming up with more and better ideas and
solutions on its own.
Let Us Know About Your Idea Power Successes
